== Table Description ==
A table capturing location-specific operational details including identifiers, names, cost rates, resource availability, and modification timestamps for manufacturing or production facilities.

== Column Information ==

[Name] Name: Names of production locations or work centers, including 'Final Assembly', 'Sheet Metal Racks', and 'Paint Shop'. 14 unique names, including "Final Assembly", "Sheet Metal Racks", "Subassembly", "Paint Shop", "Frame Forming", with an average length of 13.9 characters
[UnitCost] CostRate: Hourly cost rates in USD, ranging from 0 to 25, with examples like 0, 8.5, and 25. Unit costs ranging from 0 to 25 with an average of 8.59 across 14 items.
[ResourceUtilization] Availability: Resource availability in hours, ranging from 0 to 120, with examples like 0, 54.57, and 120. Resource utilization metrics ranging from 0 to 120 (average: 54.57) across 14 records.
[AuditTimestamp] ModifiedDate: Audit timestamp indicating the last modification, uniformly set to 2008-04-30T00:00 across all records. Audit trail spans from 2008-04-30T00:00 to 2008-04-30T00:00 across 14 records

== Table Description ==
Tracks vendor-specific product procurement details including lead times, pricing, order quantities, and receipt history for 460 product-vendor relationships.

== Column Information ==
[EntityIdentifier] ProductID: Unique identifier for the product, such as 456, 857, or 326. Contains 265 unique entity identifiers, including examples such as "456", "857", "326", "710", "370".
[EntityIdentifier] BusinessEntityID: Unique identifier for the business entity (vendor), such as 1554, 1588, or 1560. Contains 86 unique entity identifiers, including examples such as "1554", "1588", "1560", "1566", "1562".
[OperationalMetric] AverageLeadTime: Average number of days to receive goods from the vendor, ranging from 10 to 120 days with an average of 19.45. Operational metrics ranging from 10 to 120 with an average of 19.45 across 460 records.
[UnitCost] StandardPrice: Standard purchase price per unit, ranging from $0.20 to $78.89 with an average of $34.63. Unit costs ranging from 0.20 to 78.89 with an average of 34.63 across 456 items.
[UnitCost] LastReceiptCost: Cost of the most recent receipt per unit, ranging from $0.21 to $82.83 with an average of $36.28. Unit costs ranging from 0.21 to 82.83 with an average of 36.28 across 460 items.
[EventDate] LastReceiptDate: Date of the last product receipt, such as 2011-07-22 or 2014-10-22. Events occurring between 2011-07-22T00:00 and 2014-10-22T00:00 across 460 records
[Quantity] MinOrderQty: Minimum quantity that must be ordered in a single purchase, ranging from 1 to 5,000 units. Quantities ranging from 1 to 5,000 (average: 145.91) across 460 entries
[Quantity] MaxOrderQty: Maximum quantity allowed in a single order, ranging from 5 to 15,000 units. Quantities ranging from 5 to 15,000 (average: 776.47) across 460 entries
[Quantity] OnOrderQty: Quantity currently on order from the vendor, ranging from 3 to 8,000 units (missing for 66% of records). Quantities ranging from 3 to 8,000 (average: 660.74) across 155 entries
[UnitMeasureCode] UnitMeasureCode: Unit of measure code, such as EA (each), CTN (carton), or GAL (gallon). 7 unit codes, including CTN, EA, CAN, CS, GAL
[Timestamp] ModifiedDate: Date and time the record was last updated, such as 2011-07-22T00:00 or 2015-08-12T12:28.343000. Timestamps ranging from 2011-07-22T00:00 to 2015-08-12T12:28.343000 across 460 records

== Table Description ==
Historical employment records linking employees to departments, shifts, and groups with associated start and end dates, including personal details such as name and title.

[EndDate] EndDate: Date the employee ended the department assignment, with values present for only a few records, such as 2009-07-14 or 2013-11-13. End dates ranging from 2009-07-14T00:00 to 2013-11-13T00:00 across 6 records
